channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.22 (Build 20260527)
item.description:
What's New

feat(remote-desktop): machine B always-on session tap + dynamic status bar toggle

Problem: regression introduced in af43119 changed session tap to lazy

(frontmost-based), breaking Vietnamese input on machine B when machine A

disables XKey. Remote desktop server daemons inject events at session level,

bypassing HID tap — lazy tap never fires on B since the daemon is never frontmost.

Solution: isRemoteDesktopTarget preference (default false) lets machine B opt in

to an always-on tailAppendEventTap at cgSessionEventTap. Machine A retains the

lazy strategy (session tap only while RD client is frontmost) to avoid timing

interference with Notion/Kiro CLI.

  • Preferences: add isRemoteDesktopTarget (bool, default false)
  • SharedSettings: add XKey.isRemoteDesktopTarget key + computed property;

exclude from iCloud sync scalars (device-specific — B != A)

  • EventTapManager: dual-mode session tap strategy controlled by isRemoteDesktopTarget;

tailAppendEventTap always-on for machine B, lazy frontmost-based for machine A

  • AppDelegate.applyPreferences: restart event tap when isRemoteDesktopTarget changes
  • AdvancedSection: toggle + description in Remote Desktop settings group
  • StatusBarViewModel: detect running RD apps via NSWorkspace notifications;

expose isRemoteDesktopRunning + isRemoteDesktopTarget published vars;

setRemoteDesktopTarget() writes SharedSettings + restarts EventTapManager;

observe sharedSettingsDidChange to stay in sync with Settings panel changes

  • StatusBarPopoverView: show "Remote Session Tap" toggle below "Gõ Tiếng Việt"

only when a remote desktop app is running; multiline subtitle with fixedSize

  • Localizable.xcstrings: add en/zh-Hans for 3 new UI strings

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
